finding: `check:encoding:touched` scanned unrelated untracked `tmp/` command transcripts and blocked a governed task when those transcripts contained U+FFFD, even though the claimed source and backlog files were clean.
expectedBehavior: Touched/staged encoding checks must isolate claimed or staged delivery scope, classify diagnostic temp transcripts separately, and offer a safe cleanup/quarantine command without requiring an agent to delete another owner's files.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-AAO-0157 closeout, 13 `tmp/aao-0157-*.json` files created by another agent triggered `ATM_GUARD_ENCODING_FAILED`; TASK-AAO-0159 fixed this by isolating temporary artifacts in the touched encoding guard and validating the behavior before close.
followUp: Keep the TASK-AAO-0159 scoped touched-encoding regression; future temp transcript handling should remain advisory unless a claimed/staged delivery file is actually dirty.
